title: Select KHC LIHTC and TEB lists (2017-2025)

communications.subject: Kentucky Open Records Act Request: Select KHC LIHTC and TEB lists (2017-2025)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Kentucky Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

First, applications lists (PDFs) for the following two 9% LIHTC competitive rounds:
- 2018 Competitive Application Round for Housing Credit and Non-Credit Resources
- 2019 Competitive Application Round for Housing Credit and KHC Gap Resources

Second, applications lists (PDFs) and awards  lists (AKA "funded report" or "funded projects" PDFs) for the following Tax Exempt Bond (TEB) rounds, as specified in the brackets:
- 2017 NOFA for Gap Financing for Tax Exempt Bonds [applications & awards]
- 2019 Tax-Exempt Bond NOFA [applications & awards]
- 2020 Tax-Exempt Bonds with Gap Financing NOFA [applications]
- 2022 NOFA for Tax-Exempt Bonds with Gap Financing [applications & awards]
- 2023 Tax-Exempt Bond with KHC Gap Financing NOFA [applications]
- 2025 Tax-Exempt Bond Only NOFA [awards]

For reference, regarding the two housing credit application lists, see the 2026 equivalent at https://www.kyhousing.org/Partners/Developers/Multifamily/Documents/2026%20Housing%20Credit%20Application%20Submissions.pdf.

For reference, regarding the TEB-related records, see the following from 2024:
- Equivalent applications list: https://www.kyhousing.org/Partners/Developers/Multifamily/Documents/2024%20Tax-Exempt%20Bond%20Only%20NOFA%20Applications%20Submitted.pdf
- Equivalent awards list: https://www.kyhousing.org/Partners/Developers/Multifamily/Documents/2024%20Tax-Exempt%20Bond%20Only%20NOFA%20Funded%20Applications.pdf

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Lars Brown
